name: apprise
description: Send push notifications via apprise-mcp — a Rust MCP bridge to the Apprise universal notification library (Slack, Discord, email, Telegram, and 100+ services).

server_url.title: MCP server URL
server_url.description: Base URL the MCP client connects to, e.g. http://localhost:8765. The plugin appends /mcp — do NOT include a trailing /mcp path.

api_token.title: MCP API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication (APPRISE_MCP_TOKEN). Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32` or `just gen-token`. Must match what the server is configured with.

no_auth.title: Disable MCP auth
no_auth.description: Run the MCP HTTP server without bearer-token auth. Only safe when an upstream gateway enforces auth before traffic reaches apprise-mcp.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. `bearer` uses only the static API token. `oauth` enables Google OAuth/JWT for clients like Codex while the API token is still accepted for this Claude Code plugin connection. OAuth requires public_url, google_client_id, google_client_secret, and auth_admin_email.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer/resource metadata, e.g. https://apprise.example.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth. Create a Web application OAuth client in Google Cloud Console.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret used when auth_mode=oauth.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth without an allowlisted account.

use_docker.title: Deploy with Docker
use_docker.description: True: run via the bundled docker compose stack (containerized, exposes port 8765, mounts /data as a volume). False: run the binary as a systemd user service.

apprise_url.title: Apprise API URL
apprise_url.description: Base URL of the upstream Apprise API server (APPRISE_URL), e.g. http://apprise:8000. This is the Apprise notification service, not the MCP server.

apprise_token.title: Apprise API token
apprise_token.description: Optional bearer token for the upstream Apprise API server (APPRISE_TOKEN). Leave empty for open installs.
